text: 619 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنِ اِتَّقَى عَلَى ثَوْبِهِ فِي صَلاَتِهِ فَلَيْسَ لِلَّهِ اِكْتَسَى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.619 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever is overly cautious about his clothing during prayer (focusing excessively on keeping it clean or arranged), is not truly clothing himself for Allah (swt)”.
